breakdown.creativeCore: Anime Movie Pitch Document with Poster and Settei：Generates a comprehensive anime production layout featuring a cinematic movie poster on top and detailed character, prop, and environment reference sheets below.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, grid, callout]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
